name: AstraProfile900
comment: Astra Profile900 is a compact and quiet moving head Profile, boasting an impressive array of effects and ideal for any stage. This model features a bright 7000K white LED source, delivering a remarkable 43.000 lumen output (fixture output by goniometer) and being an excellent main light for large stages.
